path-resolution.description: All require() calls using RAPID_TOOLS path must use path.dirname() to resolve from the directory containing rapid-tools.cjs, not from the filename itself

definition.scope: Fix require() path resolution in skills/init/SKILL.md and skills/register-web/SKILL.md where ${RAPID_TOOLS}/../lib/ fails because Node treats the .cjs filename as a directory component. Establish path.dirname() convention for all RAPID_TOOLS-relative requires.

tasks.description: Fix require() path patterns in skills/init/SKILL.md (2 affected lines)
Fix require() path patterns in skills/register-web/SKILL.md (2 affected lines)

acceptance: All require() paths using RAPID_TOOLS resolve correctly
